mapper.select: SELECT product_category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM domestic_orders GROUP BY product_category
SELECT user_city, COUNT(*) AS count FROM domestic_orders GROUP BY user_city
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(purchase_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(consumption_amount) AS total FROM domestic_orders GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(purchase_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM domestic_orders GROUP BY date ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT product_category AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM domestic_orders WHERE product_category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY product_category ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT name, category, price, supplier, stock FROM domestic_products LIMIT 20
